channel.title: 5 on Lucaji’s Pages
channel.description: Recent content in 5 on Lucaji’s Pages

item.title: Firemakers - Metal Empire
item.description: The Songs In 2005 the Fire Makers joined to realized their Metal Empire unpublished demo. The original tracklist, as I have it recorded includes Fire Makers - Tears Of Pain Fire Makers - Devil’s Lie Personnel Recorded at ACME Recording Studio in Raiano (AQ), Italy Lead Vocals Eugent Bushpepa Lead & Rhythm Guitar Max Candido Lead Guitar and Vocals Carlo Cicognani Bass Guitar and Vocals Tonino Vosolo Drums Matteo Corelli Keyboards Luca Cipressi Luca’s Gears For this recording I played the piano and organ parts with the Hammond replica by Roland: the Roland VK-8.
